description: Configure Horizontal Pod Autoscalers (HPAs) and Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs) for four microservices in the 'ecommerce-prod' namespace in preparation for an upcoming high-traffic event. Implement the 8 resources (4 HPAs, 4 PDBs) exactly as specified in the scaling specification document at /home/ga/Desktop/scaling_spec.md. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!

metadata.occupation: Cloud Systems Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
